import React from 'react'; function Home() { return (

Welcome to RentalRoomSystem

This is a React + Bootstrap starter structure for the RentalRoomSystem frontend. Use the Login page to connect to your backend API and add pages for room listings, booking management, and user dashboards.

Key folders:

  • components/ reusable UI components
  • pages/ page views and routes
  • services/ API calls and backend integration
  • hooks/ shared React hooks
  • contexts/ global state providers
  • styles/ custom CSS overrides
); } export default Home;
